title: setroubleshoot bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.3.35-4.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- Add setroubleshoot-oracle-enterprise.patch to change bug reporting
  URL to bugzilla.oracle.com [Orabug: 29870389]

[3.3.35-4]
- audit_data: include syslog when needed (RHEL-39700)

[3.3.35-3]
- Reload auditd using auditctl instead of service
- Drop dependency on initscripts-service
Resolves: rhbz#2365614

[3.3.35-2]
- Update tmpfiles.d config (bz#2346971)
full_text:
[3.3.35-4.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- Add setroubleshoot-oracle-enterprise.patch to change bug reporting
  URL to bugzilla.oracle.com [Orabug: 29870389]

[3.3.35-4]
- audit_data: include syslog when needed (RHEL-39700)

[3.3.35-3]
- Reload auditd using auditctl instead of service
- Drop dependency on initscripts-service
Resolves: rhbz#2365614

[3.3.35-2]
- Update tmpfiles.d config (bz#2346971)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20285-0.html
